children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: There shall be a Director of the Coast Guard Investigative Service.

children.heading: .—Chain of Command
children.label: b .—Chain of Command
children.text: The Director of the Coast Guard Investigative Service shall report directly to and be under the general supervision of the Commandant, acting through the Vice Commandant of the Coast Guard.
